videos.title: Google I/O 2026 keynote in 35 minutes
videos.description: Google just wrapped one of its biggest keynotes of the year Google I/O 2026 and the company is all in on AI. Announcements included a new family of their Gemini 3.5 AI model which will add personalized AI in a whole suite of systems. Starting today, Gemini 3.5 Flash will be the default model for the Gemini app and AI Mode in Search and agent-first coding. Alongside Gemini 3.5, Google is launching Gemini Omni, a new AI generation tool which the company says can “create anything with any input” an

videos.title: Google I/O 2026 reactions | The Vergecast Livestream
videos.description:
Google I/O is upon us, which means Gemini season starts a few days early this year. We’ll go live after Google’s 1PM ET / 10AM PT keynote with reactions from The Verge’s senior AI reporter Hayden Field and executive editor Jake Kastrenakes.

videos.title: Users of Google Flow Music can now have more precise tracking
videos.description:
Google is expanding what its Flow AI tool can do, allowing users to "vibe code any creative tool you can think of." Users of Google Flow Music can now have more precise tracking, change style of songs, and create music videos. What do the musicians in the crowd think?

videos.title: Google annouces Gemini 2.5 Pro-powered “Stitch” experiment
videos.description:
Google is launching a new generative AI tool that helps developers swiftly turn rough UI ideas into functional, app-ready designs.

The Gemini 2.5 Pro-powered “Stitch” experiment is available on Google Labs and can turn text prompts and reference images into “complex UI designs and frontend code in minutes,” according to the announcement during Google’s I/O event, sparing developers from manually creating design elements and then programming around them.

Read more from Jess Weatherbed at thever

videos.title: Would you let robots spend your money?
videos.description:
Would you let robots spend your money? At Google I/O, the company unveiled the latest iteration of its AI commerce tools: a “Universal Cart” that works across different retailers and Google products like Gemini — and eventually YouTube and Gmail, too.

Read more from Mia Sato at theverge.com

videos.title: New Google Search feature will create "super apps"
videos.description:
As announced at Google I/O 2026, Google AI Pro and AI Ultra subscribers will gain access to a new feature that allows them to create “super apps” directly in Search.

Read more from Emma Roth at theverge.com
